@graph.name: Jaguar models fitted with the AJ20P6

mainEntity.name: How much does a Jaguar AJ20P6 engine replacement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: A reconditioned AJ20P6 typically costs £4,500–£7,500 supply only [EM‑QUOTE], varying by specification and power output. Fitting adds £780–£1,040 depending on labour rates.

mainEntity.name: Is the Jaguar AJ20P6 a reliable engine?

acceptedAnswer.text: The AJ20P6 scores 3.5/5 for reliability [JAG‑VERIFIED], with 85% confidence based on early‑market data. Cooling system maintenance is the key to longevity.

mainEntity.name: What is the most common AJ20P6 failure?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most common issue is coolant system leaks — from water pumps, expansion tanks or plastic fittings — typically appearing between 60,000–120,000 miles.

mainEntity.name: Which Jaguar models use the AJ20P6?

acceptedAnswer.text: The AJ20P6 powers the Jaguar F‑Pace P400 and XF P400 — the brand's premium petrol SUV and executive saloon.

mainEntity.name: Is the Jaguar AJ20P6 the same as Land Rover's version?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — it's the same 3.0‑litre straight‑six Ingenium petrol engine, used across both brands with identical parts and shared cooling‑system characteristics.

hero.tagPill: Jaguar • AJ20P6 / P400 • Petrol • 3.0L I6 Turbo • 2019–present
hero.h1: Jaguar AJ20P6 Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost
hero.subHeadline: The Jaguar AJ20P6 is a modern 3.0‑litre straight‑six petrol — strong and refined, but cooling system monitoring is essential. Backed by 80+ real UK enquiries in 2025 [EM‑VERIFIED].

verdictRating.confidence: 85% — based on 80 UK enquiries and early‑market specialist feedback.

rows.score: 12 (A mix of manageable cooling issues and more complex timing‑chain work)
12 (Available but not yet as ubiquitous as older engines; JLR‑specific parts)
20 (Reconditioned cost against lowest host value (~£30,000) is well under 30%)

verdictRating.oneLineVerdict: The AJ20P6 is a capable, modern six‑cylinder — but early examples need coolant system vigilance — buy with a full JLR service history.
verdictRating.bestFor: Drivers wanting a smooth, powerful petrol SUV or saloon with reasonable running costs.
verdictRating.avoidIf: Buyers expecting the simplicity of older naturally‑aspirated sixes.

compatibility.crossBrandNote: Also powers the Land Rover Range Rover, Velar and Defender → [link].

costGuide.labourEstimate: Fitting an AJ20P6 typically takes 12–16 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [EM‑QUOTE].
costGuide.sharedCostNote: Parts cost is identical across Jaguar and Land Rover applications; labour time varies slightly by engine bay access.
